title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on risk, courage and personal development.

questions.question: Do you think society is becoming too risk-averse, or are there good reasons why we try to minimise risk in modern life?
How important is failure as part of personal development, and can people learn to become more resilient in the face of setbacks?

script.text: Do you think society is becoming too risk-averse, or are there good reasons why we try to minimise risk in modern life?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
